creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
Created attachment 237150
Update to 0.3.2

Update dovecot-fts-flatcurve to the latest release including a number of fixes.
Full changelog can be found here:

https://github.com/slusarz/dovecot-fts-flatcurve/compare/v0.3.1...v0.3.2


Aside: Maybe the comment at the top of mail/dovecot/Makefile should also be amended to include dovecot-fts-flatcurve in the list of ports that need their PORTREVISION bumped whenever PORTVERSION of dovecot changes. dovecot-fts-flatcurve is affected the same way.
